EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} created object "{object.name}" of the "{object.type}" type in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} configured protected application {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created group "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the account {object.account.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created rule "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
